packages.public_message: Hodges favors lawful prosperity and stable relations among sovereign states.

actions.summary: Pursue a rules-based trade and non-aggression framework with nation_2.
Expand port capacity, customs administration, and commercial logistics.

packages.public_message: The League prefers profitable passage, but it will not neglect strategic leverage.

actions.summary: Offer structured talks on reducing friction with nation_3 while preserving route access.
Increase treasury reserves through coordinated trade and port revenues.

packages.public_message: Urartu answers uncertainty with readiness and durable stores.

actions.summary: Reinforce frontier garrisons and defensive patrols facing nation_2.
Expand depots, road links, irrigation, and fortress supply depth.

judgeNotes: Republic of Hodges sought improved relations with nation_2.
Republic of Hodges deepened internal capacity and resilience.
Aksumite League sought improved relations with nation_3.
Kingdom of Urartu applied visible military pressure toward nation_2.
Kingdom of Urartu deepened internal capacity and resilience.
